message:
fix: correct PostToolUse payload field names and hooks matcher

Discovered via live probe that the actual PostToolUse hook payload uses:
- tool_response (not tool_result)
- tool_response.stdout for Bash output (not tool_response.content)
- tool_response.content for non-Bash tools (Read, Write, etc.)
- tool_use_id at root level (already correct)
- No exit_code field; is_error at tool_response.is_error

Also fix PostToolUse matcher from "*" to "" — "*" was treated as a
literal tool name match, not a wildcard, so the hook never fired.

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,13 @@
 # post-tool-use.sh — PostToolUse hook (async)
 # Buffers one ToolCallItem into session state. No cxdb write happens here.
 # stop.sh flushes all buffered tool calls as one AssistantTurn per turn.
+#
+# Actual PostToolUse payload structure (discovered via live probe):
+#   .tool_response.stdout   — Bash stdout
+#   .tool_response.stderr   — Bash stderr
+#   .tool_response.content  — non-Bash tools (Read, Write, etc.)
+#   .tool_response.is_error — present on tool errors
+#   .tool_use_id            — always present at root level
 set -euo pipefail
 
 source "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib.sh"
@@ -16,7 +23,8 @@ tool_name=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_name // ""')
 # Compact-encode tool_input as a string (ToolCallItem.Args is type string in Go)
 args_str=$(echo "$input" | jq -c '.tool_input // {}')
 duration_ms=$(echo "$input" | jq '.duration_ms // 0')
-is_error=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_result.is_error // false')
+# is_error: present on tool errors; Bash errors appear via stderr/interrupted
+is_error=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_response.is_error // false')
 tool_use_id=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_use_id // ""')
 
 # Generate ID if not provided by Claude Code
@@ -69,18 +77,27 @@ case "$tool_name" in
     ;;
 esac
 
+# Extract content from tool_response:
+# - Bash: stdout field (append stderr if non-empty)
+# - Other tools: content field
+# - Error case: stderr or content
+content=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '
+  .tool_response |
+  if .stdout != null then
+    (.stdout // "") + (if (.stderr // "") != "" then "\n[stderr]: " + .stderr else "" end)
+  else
+    (.content // "")
+  end
+')
+
 # Build ToolCallItem based on success/error
 if [ "$is_error" = "true" ]; then
-  error_msg=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_result.content // ""')
-  exit_code=$(echo "$input" | jq '.tool_result.exit_code // null')
-
   tool_call=$(jq -n \
     --arg id "$tool_use_id" \
     --arg name "$tool_name" \
     --arg args "$args_str" \
     --arg desc "$desc" \
-    --arg errmsg "$error_msg" \
-    --argjson exit_code "$exit_code" \
+    --arg errmsg "$content" \
     --argjson duration_ms "$duration_ms" \
     '{
       "id": $id,
@@ -91,20 +108,16 @@ if [ "$is_error" = "true" ]; then
       "duration_ms": $duration_ms,
       "error": {
         "message": $errmsg,
-        "exit_code": $exit_code
+        "exit_code": null
       }
     }')
 else
-  content=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_result.content // ""')
-  exit_code=$(echo "$input" | jq '.tool_result.exit_code // null')
-
   tool_call=$(jq -n \
     --arg id "$tool_use_id" \
     --arg name "$tool_name" \
     --arg args "$args_str" \
     --arg desc "$desc" \
     --arg content "$content" \
-    --argjson exit_code "$exit_code" \
     --argjson duration_ms "$duration_ms" \
     '{
       "id": $id,
@@ -116,7 +129,7 @@ else
       "result": {
         "content": $content,
         "success": true,
-        "exit_code": $exit_code
+        "exit_code": null
       }
     }')
 fi
